heading: News
sub_heading_1: New Wisconsin State Hall of Famers!
body_1: Congrats to our association’s own Pam Haertl (GFCUSBC Hall-of-Fame Class of 1992), Rob Schuh (GFCUSBC Hall-of-Fame Class of 2015), and Melissa Lang for their well-deserved induction into the Wisconsin State Bowling Hall of Fame! Read more about their accomplishments
